fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign to which the campaign entry is linked.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the campaign entry.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the campaign entry was recorded. The field is not editable.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who has created the campaign entry. The field is not editable, and is filled in automatically by the program.

fields.name: Segment No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the segment linked to the campaign entry. The field is not editable.
The program fills in this field when you log an interaction and a segment that are linked to this campaign.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the entry has been canceled.

fields.name: No. of Interactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of interactions created as part of the campaign entry. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the campaign entry. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the action linked to the campaign entry. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson who is responsible for the action linked to the campaign entry.

fields.name: Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the logged segment (if any) to which the campaign entry is linked.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document if there is one that the campaign entry records. You cannot change the contents of this field.
The following options are available.


Document Options

Sales Blnkt. Ord.
